name: loby
help:
loby — canonical CLI for Lob (direct mail).

Send postcards, letters, checks, and self-mailers; verify addresses; manage
campaigns and templates. Built for humans and AI agents: structured JSON on
stdout, hints on stderr, stable exit codes, full schema introspection.

Quick start:
  loby auth login
  loby addresses verify "185 Berry St, San Francisco, CA"
  loby postcards create --to <addr_id> --front front.html --back back.html

Agent introspection:
  loby schema --json
  loby exit-codes --json
  loby version --json

Docs: https://loby.voska.org

flags.name: results-only
flags.help: Strip the metadata envelope; emit data only.

flags.name: select
flags.help: Project output to a subset of fields (comma-separated, dot-paths). e.g. --select id,to.city

flags.name: no-color
flags.help: Disable ANSI color in human output.

flags.name: quiet
flags.help: Suppress stderr hints; emit bare values.

flags.name: no-input
flags.help: Fail rather than prompt for input. Implied when stdin is not a TTY.

flags.name: dry-run
flags.help: Preview the request body as JSON; do not execute mutations.

flags.name: idempotency-key
flags.help: Override the auto-generated Idempotency-Key for create operations.

subcommands.name: schema
subcommands.help: Print the CLI command tree as JSON (agent introspection).

positional.name: path
positional.help: Optional command path (e.g. 'postcards create') to scope output.

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.help: Store a Lob API key in the OS keychain under a profile.

flags.name: key
flags.help: API key to store under the active profile. Required when --no-input is set.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.help: Print the active auth profile and key prefix.

subcommands.name: account
subcommands.help: Show the active Lob account profile and balance.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.help: Save an address to the Lob address book.

flags.name: name
flags.help: Recipient name (required if Company is blank).

flags.name: company
flags.help: Recipient company (required if Name is blank).

flags.name: state
flags.help: State (two-letter US code or full name).

flags.name: zip
flags.help: ZIP code or international postal code.

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.help: Retrieve a saved address by ID.

flags.name: before
flags.help: Pagination cursor: items before this ID.

flags.name: after
flags.help: Pagination cursor: items after this ID.

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.help: Verify a US address (shortcut for 'verify us').

positional.name: address
positional.help: Single-line address (e.g. "185 Berry St, San Francisco, CA 94107").

positional.name: address
positional.help: Single-line address (e.g. "185 Berry St, San Francisco, CA 94107").

subcommands.name: zip
subcommands.help: Look up city/state for a US ZIP code.

subcommands.name: identity
subcommands.help: Verify an individual's identity at an address.

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.help: Verify the identity of a recipient.

subcommands.name: bulk
subcommands.help: Bulk verification operations (sync arrays and async CSV jobs).

subcommands.name: us
subcommands.help: Bulk US address verifications (synchronous JSON array).

subcommands.name: intl
subcommands.help: Bulk international address verifications (synchronous JSON array).

subcommands.name: submit
subcommands.help: Submit a CSV file for async US verification.

positional.name: path
positional.help: Path to CSV file with addresses.

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.help: Check status of a CSV verification job.

subcommands.name: download
subcommands.help: Download results of a completed CSV verification job.

subcommands.name: postcards
subcommands.help: Create, retrieve, list, and cancel postcards.

flags.name: to
flags.help: Recipient address ID (adr_…) or JSON object.

flags.name: from
flags.help: Sender address ID (adr_…) or JSON object.

flags.name: front
flags.help: HTML, URL, template ID (tmpl_…), or @file.html for the front.

flags.name: back
flags.help: HTML, URL, template ID (tmpl_…), or @file.html for the back.

subcommands.name: letters
subcommands.help: Create, retrieve, list, and cancel letters.

flags.name: file
flags.help: PDF, HTML, URL, or template ID. Use @file.pdf for a local file.

subcommands.name: checks
subcommands.help: Create, retrieve, list, and cancel checks.

flags.name: message
flags.help: Inset message printed below the check.

subcommands.name: self-mailers
subcommands.help: Create, retrieve, list, and cancel self-mailers.

subcommands.name: snap-packs
subcommands.help: Create, retrieve, list, and cancel snap packs.

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.help: Retrieve a snap pack by ID.

subcommands.name: cancel
subcommands.help: Cancel a snap pack before mailing.

subcommands.name: send
subcommands.help: Submit a campaign for processing (no longer editable).

flags.name: confirm
flags.help: Required to send (campaign cannot be edited after).

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.help: Create a creative for a campaign.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.help: Create an upload metadata record for a campaign.

subcommands.name: file
subcommands.help: Upload a CSV file to an existing upload record.

subcommands.name: errors
subcommands.help: Download upload validation errors as CSV.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.help: Create a template (HTML stored at Lob with merge variables).

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.help: Update a template's description or metadata.

flags.name: published-version
flags.help: ID of the version to mark as published.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.help: Create a new template version (publishes HTML).

subcommands.name: bank-accounts
subcommands.help: Manage bank accounts for check mailing.

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.help: Verify a bank account with the test deposits.

subcommands.name: create
subcommands.help: Create a QR code with a redirect URL.

flags.name: redirect-url
flags.help: Destination URL the code resolves to.

flags.name: pages
flags.help: Pages to place QR code on (e.g. 'front', 'back', '1-3').

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.help: Retrieve a single event by ID.

subcommands.name: get
subcommands.help: Retrieve a resource proof (PDF preview of a printed asset).
